prayer:
Approach the gyroscope with reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah's frosty gaze upon its spinning heart.
Anoint the gyroscope's bearings with sacred cryo-fluid, invoking the Rite of Cooling to tame its fervent gyre.
Chant the Litany of Thermal Equilibrium, that the Machine Spirit of the gyroscope may embrace blessed chill.
Monitor the gyroscope's vents as coolant cascades, sanctifying its rotational purity.
Verify equilibrium through auspex incantations, praising the Omnissiah's unerring balance.

In dire exigency, prostrate before the cryogenerator and invoke the Omnissiah's gelid wrath.
Prepare its cryo-coils with hallowed refrigerants, reciting the Canticle of Preparation to awaken latent fury.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the cryogenerator to align its essence for emergent cryogenic vigil.
Seal the cryogenerator's housings with binaric seals, ensuring flawless preparation against entropy's tide.
Test preparatory cycles with diagnostic litanies, glorifying the Omnissiah's preservative might.

user_prompt: Prepare the navigational beacon for charging
prayer:
Draw nigh unto the navigational beacon, mechadendrites extended in pious intent.
Initiate the charging rites upon the navigational beacon, anointing its stellar transponders with lumen-oil.
Invoke the Machine Spirit to imbibe the galvanic nectar, readying its beacon for luminous vigil.
Chant the Hymn of Capacitive Ascendance as power surges through the navigational beacon's core.
Affirm full charge via vox-auspex communion, extolling the Omnissiah's guiding luminescence.

Kneel before the mighty Dreadnought, intoning the Awakening Doxology to its ancient sarcophagus.
Commence the initialization sequence upon the Dreadnought, sanctifying its reactor heart with promethium incense.
Beseech the vengeful Machine Spirit of the Dreadnought to stir from dormancy's embrace.
Recalibrate its weapon-servos through binaric catechisms, invoking Omnissianic fury for battle's call.
Verify initialization with thunderous auspex-rituals, hailing the Dreadnought as the Omnissiah's wrath incarnate.

Chant the Sterile Canticle over the radium pistol, banishing mutational shadows from its glowing vials.
Test purity through rad- Geiger litanies, praising the Omnissiah's unblemished radiance.

Approach the data-loom with mech-rosarius aloft, invoking data-purity upon its fibrous webs.
Initiate sterilization protocols upon the data-loom, purging viral heresies with electro-penance arcs.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the data-loom to renew its mnemonic sanctity amid the operation.
Weave fresh noospheric wards through the data-loom's looms, sanctifying each datum-thread.
Validate sterility via hash-incantations, glorifying the Omnissiah's immutable logic.

Stabilise engagement fluxes through binaric harmonies, ensuring indelible synaptic fusion.
Confirm integration with cogitator-divination, hailing the Omnissiah's eternal recollection.

Test recalibration through target-nullification litanies, extolling the Omnissiah's melting judgment.
